title: November 6 2023 council minutes
body: Dustyn Fox on aquifer 5 mgd / 50 MW power / NDA-bound rep; Bruce Moore on third-reading waiver intent.

title: March 18 2024 Committee of the Whole minutes
body: Jay Weaver: Bruce Moore contacting council members individually; Mayor Goldhardt: skirting around Sunshine Law; Solicitor Mattes: emails / personal phone or text can be public records; AWS-property TIF discussion.

source.label: March 18 2024 Committee of the Whole minutes

title: Resolution 17-2023
body: Statement of services for the proposed 267.59-acre Jahn / K-Nova annexation. Sewer-capacity caveat: village did not then have sanitary sewer capacity available.

title: Ordinance 2024-02 (died for lack of motion)
body: First 2024 K-Nova rezoning attempt. Stamped 'Died Due to a Lack of a Motion.'

title: Wasmus PRR Production 2026-04-29
body: 29-page Major Site Plan Application packet. Includes blank application form (Council signature blocks empty), C001 title sheet (8x 220,000 SF + 45,000 SF substation support + substation + water tower + security building), C100-C400 plan sheets, ALTA / NSPS Land Title Surveys for K-Nova II LLC, full landscape plan series. AMAZON DATA SERVICES INC named as adjacent parcel owner north of K-Nova / Jahn site.
why_it_matters: Third-party PRR by Cory Wasmus. Production NOT a complete records dump on procedural history; appears narrowly limited to the Major Site Plan Application packet.

title: February 2 2026 council minutes
body: Major site plan approved on behalf of K-Nova by Scannell Properties #627 LLC. Wastewater plant 1.4 mgd capacity; current flows 400-500 kgd.

title: Ordinance 2023-11
body: Annexed 267.59 acres into Commercial Point. Eric Young Trustee, Alice Jahn, K-Nova LLC. Craig Moncrief agent.

title: February 23 2026 council minutes
body: Miller moratorium proposal; Nungester 'by right' statement; AWS NDA timeline raised by Wasmus; Geiger non-renewal notice.

title: April 1 2024 council minutes
body: No motion to adopt 2024-02; motion to amend exhibits died for lack of second; rezoning denied due to lack of motion. Bruce Moore: data centers only, no warehouses.

title: Ordinance 2023-10
body: Amended Section 1042.05 for cooling water and unpolluted industrial process water discharge into sanitary sewer.

title: Ordinance 2023-09
body: Amended zoning code (Chapter 1171.02(c)) to add Data Centers as permissible under Limited Manufacturing District. Declared an emergency.

title: October 16 2023 Committee of the Whole minutes
body: Bruce Moore: Jahn property to be rezoned PID like the property to the north; data center inquiries; possibly ask Council to waive third reading.

source.label: October 16 2023 Committee of the Whole minutes

title: May 20 2024 K-Nova public hearing minutes
body: 4 council members listed present (Geiger, Weaver, Nungester, Crego); resident Tim Bivens raised power, water, police coverage, aesthetics, neighborhood disruption, comprehensive-plan concerns.
why_it_matters: Public hearing attendance discrepancy with the Special Council vote (5 voters) needs special-meeting record to resolve.

title: February 26 2024 K-Nova rezoning public hearing minutes
body: M/I Homes' Josh Barkan on residential environment for Foxfire homes; resident concerns about health, environment, noise, light, air, public-vote, police coverage, electrical substations.

source.label: February 26 2024 K-Nova rezoning public hearing minutes

title: Ordinance 2024-05
body: Amends Chapter 1143.04(e). Decision window 45 to 120 days; resubmission bar one year to six months.

title: Resolution 38-2023
body: Accepted limited warranty deed for 4.308 acres from K-Nova LLC for ROW use on SR 104 and Durrett Road. Emergency clause: real estate closing between K-Nova and 'potential buyer' needs to be accomplished as soon as possible.
why_it_matters: 'Potential buyer' phrase: records-request the closing documents and identify the buyer.

title: Ordinance 2024-07
body: Rezones 266.971 acres K-Nova / Jahn Farm from Exceptional Use to PID. 4-1 vote on suspension and on passage. Section 4 emergency clause cites commercial opportunities and job creation. Permits utilities aboveground where absolutely necessary.
why_it_matters: Central document for procedural-defect analysis. Two-year ORC 713.121 ceiling runs to ~May 20 2026.

title: May 6 2024 council minutes
body: Adopted Ord 2024-05. Mayor explained 75% reading-waiver = five of six. Wolfe resignation effective same day.

title: Ordinance 2026-03
body: Prohibits gas-fired electric generation facilities using turbines in all zoning districts.
